name: Yamato (OP01-121) (Reprint)
effect_text: Also treat this card's name as [Kouzuki Oden] according to the rules.[Double Attack] (This card deals 2 damage.)[Banish] (When this card deals damage, the target card is trashed without activating its Trigger.)Disclaimer: This card was reprinted from the original set with an additional security stamp on the bottom-left corner (note that this difference is not visible in official sample images).
